_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in implementing automated data pipeline testing — unit tests for individual transformations, integration tests for end-to-end data flows, and regression tests that validate output consistency across pipeline changes.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Skill AB-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.494), SP-T-009 (SP, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.705). Shared vocabulary: [testing]. NICE-only terms [operational, perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, automated, changes, consistency, data, end] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.885, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the NICE element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Perform operational testing" and "Skill in implementing automated data pipeline testing — unit tests for individua" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.494 < STS 0.705 (gap -0.211). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [operational, perform] and [across, automated, changes] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Shared tokens: [testing]. NICE-only: [operational, perform]. WIDAI-only: [across, automated, changes, consistency, data, end].
